businessInfo.name: Siddhi Vinayak Services
businessInfo.tagline: Your Trusted AC Partner for Life

process.title: Book a Call
process.description: Customer contacts us via phone or online booking.

process.title: Expert Inspection
process.description: Site visit & diagnosis including free gas level check.

process.title: Quality Service
process.description: Genuine parts & precision work using foam and jet spray.

process.title: Cooling Guaranteed
process.description: Final testing, clean-up, and 30-day service guarantee.

services.name: Power Jet AC Service
services.description: Deep cleaning using high-pressure jet pump for maximum cooling.

services.name: Split AC Installation
services.description: Professional installation with precision alignment and gas check.

services.name: Window AC Installation
services.description: Secure mounting and sealing for window units.

services.name: AC Gas Refilling
services.description: Full gas charging or top-up with pressure testing.

sales.title: Buy New/Refurbished ACs
sales.description: Best deals on top brands like Daikin, Voltas, and LG.

sales.title: Genuine Spare Parts
sales.description: High-quality copper pipes, compressors, and remotes.

sales.title: Sell Your Old AC
sales.description: We buy old units at the best market price.

faqs.question: How often should I service my AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend a full service every 3-4 months for optimal performance and energy efficiency.

faqs.question: Do you provide a warranty on repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a 30-day service guarantee on all our work.

faqs.question: Are your technicians verified?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. All our technicians are background-checked and highly experienced experts.
